MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Manuel Fuentes.
Attorney Margaret Pompei appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant George Davis-Smith is present.
Attorney Mehran Fardis representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of AUG-27-2012 is vacated.
